message:
test(proptest): expand tantivy_quality (13→28) and bloom_filter (15→25) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

tantivy_quality: add 15 new tests covering RelevanceAssertion serde
roundtrips for all 9 variants, GoldenQuery serde roundtrip, and
aggregate report invariants (error/latency partitions).

bloom_filter: add 10 new tests covering BloomStats serde roundtrip,
stats consistency with filter state (count, fill_ratio, fp_rate),
union commutativity, counting filter saturation/floor, and
with_params constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
